name: event
description: Hook event type: PreToolUse, PostToolUse, etc.

name: hook
description: Guard script name (guard-branch, guard-files, guard-destructive, etc.)

name: tool
description: Claude Code tool name (Bash, Read, Write, Edit, etc.)

name: result
description: Guardrail outcome: deny, warn, allow, error

name: reason
description: Human-readable message shown to the user on deny/warn

name: project
description: Git repository root path (CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR or cwd)

name: context
description: Structured context captured by each guard — enables per-hook analytics

fields.name: git_op
fields.description: Git subcommand: commit, push, merge, rebase, gh_api_delete

fields.name: target_branch
fields.description: Branch name that triggered the guard (guard-branch)

fields.name: protection_type
fields.description: Why the branch was blocked: protected, blocklist (guard-branch)

fields.name: enforcement_method
fields.description: How the operation was attempted: git_cli, gh_api (guard-branch)

fields.name: filename
fields.description: Basename of the blocked file (guard-files)

fields.name: file_category
fields.description: File protection category: environment, lockfile, ci_workflow, custom_pattern, blocklist (guard-files)

fields.name: file_fullpath
fields.description: Resolved absolute path of blocked file (guard-files)

fields.name: bypass_method
fields.description: How file write was attempted: none, bash_redirect, scripting_api (guard-files)

fields.name: protection_source
fields.description: Where the protection rule came from: hardcoded, config, blocklist (guard-files)

fields.name: was_symlink
fields.description: Whether a symlink bypass was detected: true/false (guard-files)

fields.name: matched_pattern
fields.description: Pattern that triggered the block (guard-files custom, guard-commit-msg, guard-destructive)

fields.name: risk_category
fields.description: Type of destructive risk: filesystem, git, database, system, self_protection (guard-destructive)

fields.name: command_preview
fields.description: First 120 chars of blocked command (guard-destructive)

fields.name: files_staged_count
fields.description: Number of files staged at time of block (guard-blast-radius)

fields.name: packages_touched_count
fields.description: Number of monorepo packages touched (guard-blast-radius)

fields.name: max_files_threshold
fields.description: Configured file count threshold (guard-blast-radius)

fields.name: max_packages_threshold
fields.description: Configured package count threshold (guard-blast-radius)

fields.name: packages_list
fields.description: Comma-separated list of packages touched (guard-blast-radius)

fields.name: was_cooldown_escalation
fields.description: Whether cooldown escalated warn→block: true/false (guard-blast-radius)

fields.name: enforcement
fields.description: Action taken: warn or block (guard-blast-radius)

fields.name: forbidden_pattern
fields.description: The AI attribution pattern that triggered the block (guard-commit-msg)

fields.name: pattern_source
fields.description: Where blocked pattern came from: hardcoded, config (guard-commit-msg)

fields.name: commit_msg_length
fields.description: Character length of the commit message (guard-commit-msg)
